name: Toell Co.,Ltd.
summary: Toell Co.,Ltd. engages in the production, wholesale, and retail of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in LPG container re-inspection, gas piping equipment construction, simple gas, LPG consuming destination installation, other LPG related equipment, home service, general freight car transportation, warehouse, management of nurseries, communication, security agency, and call center businesses, as well as in the online sale of food and daily necessities. It also sells propane and high pressure gases, and LPG related equipment; imports, manufactures, sells, wholesales, and exports pure water; produces and sells agricultural products; supplies electricity; generates solar power; and offers LPG cogeneration systems and fuel cells, gas heat pumps, storage batteries, and LPG generators, as well as CLOUD LINE, an Internet service. The company was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
